title: invoice — PHP attribute contracts
description: Three class-level attributes. `#[AsInvoiceListener]` subscribes a service to invoice-lane events. `#[AsInvoiceLineItemType]` registers a new item_type + its rendering + tax classification rules. `#[AsInvoicePdfRenderer]` marks a class as an invoice PDF renderer implementation (default is DomPDF; Enterprise tenants may register wkhtmltopdf or other engines).

attributes.name: AsInvoiceListener
attributes.description: Marks a service as a subscriber to invoice-lane events (InvoiceCreated / Finalized / Sent / Viewed / Paid / PartiallyPaid / Voided / Uncollectible / PastDue / Refunded / Disputed / Dunning* / WrittenOff / Line* / CreditNote*). Discovery loader picks up each class at boot + wires the declared events.

params.name: events
params.description: Array of event short names (`InvoicePaid`, `CreditNoteIssued`, `InvoiceUncollectible`, …). Empty = subscribe to every `Stackra\Finance\Invoice\Events\*` event. Names resolve against events.json at boot; typos abort boot with a discovery error.

params.name: queue
params.description: Optional queue override. Falls back to the event's default queue (see events.json — most events default to 'invoice'; state-transition events use 'invoice-critical').

params.name: priority
params.description: Handler ordering within a single event. Lower runs first. Cascade listeners (FireMarketingCaptureOnInvoicePaid runs at 100; internal audit writes run at 200 so external side-effects fire first).

attributes.name: AsInvoiceLineItemType
attributes.description: Marks a class as an InvoiceLineItemType registration. Each item_type declared here becomes a valid value for invoice_lines.item_type. Provides rendering hints (SDUI columns), tax classification (which tax_type applies), and unit_price sign convention (must be >= 0 vs may be negative).

params.name: slug
params.description: Unique item_type slug: membership_charge / addon / setup_fee / late_fee / adjustment / one_time_service / tax_line / discount_line. Additional types shipped by extending modules use their prefix (e.g. facility::session_charge).

params.name: tax_classification
params.description: Tax classification for the tax module's TaxResolver. 'goods' / 'digital_services' / 'physical_services' / 'exempt' / 'partial'. Feeds jurisdiction-specific rate lookup.

params.name: allows_negative_unit_price
params.description: true = the observer accepts negative unit_price_cents for this item_type (used by 'discount_line' + 'adjustment'). false = strict >= 0 (default).

params.name: counts_toward_revenue
params.description: true = this line's total_cents feeds the revenue report. false = internal accounting line (e.g. 'tax_line' — tax is a separate report axis).

attributes.name: AsInvoicePdfRenderer
attributes.description: Marks a class as an invoice PDF renderer implementation. Registered with the InvoicePDFRenderer factory at boot. Default implementation is DomPDF; Enterprise tenants may register wkhtmltopdf (better CSS support) or a custom renderer.

params.name: supports_templates
params.description: Template slugs this renderer supports. 'stackra-default' / 'tenant-branded' / 'minimal' / 'vat-eu'. The factory picks a renderer that supports the tenant's active template.

params.name: typical_latency_ms
params.description: Typical rendering latency in ms. Feeds the health probe + timeout configuration.

params.name: requires_entitlement
params.description: Optional entitlement gate for this renderer. Enterprise-only renderers (wkhtmltopdf) declare 'invoice_advanced_pdf'.
